Frequently Asked Questions
1. When did the UP Rojgar Sangam उत्तर प्रदेश बेसिक शिक्षा विभाग  ECECE Educator Lakhimpur kheri (Outsourcing) Online Form 2026 start?
The online application process for उत्तर प्रदेश बेसिक शिक्षा विभाग Outsourcing Recruitment 2026 started on 16 July 2026 .
2. What is the last date to apply online for उत्तर प्रदेश बेसिक शिक्षा विभाग Lakhimpur kheri ECECE Educator Outsourcing Recruitment 2026?
The last date to submit the online application form is 24 July 2026 .
3. Is registration on the UP Rojgar Sangam (Sewayojan) Portal mandatory to apply for this recruitment??
Yes. Only candidates who are registered on the UP Rojgar Sangam (Sewayojan) Portal can apply for this recruitment. If you have not registered yet, you are advised to complete your registration immediately at https://sewayojan.up.nic.in/ before submitting the application form. .
4. What is the nature of this recruitment? Is it a permanent government job??
This recruitment is being conducted on an Outsourcing basis. Candidates are advised to read the official notification carefully for complete details regarding appointment terms, salary, and service conditions before applying.
5. How can I apply for UP उत्तर प्रदेश बेसिक शिक्षा विभाग ECECE Educator Lakhimpur kheri Recruitment 2026?
How can I apply for UP उत्तर प्रदेश बेसिक शिक्षा विभाग ECECE Educator Lakhimpur kheri Recruitment 2026?

tables: Uttar Pradesh UP Basic Education Lakhimpur Kheri ECCE Educator Outsourcing Recruitment 2026 Apply Online For 71 Post

UP Rojgar Sangam (Sewayojan) Portal has released a new Outsourcing Recruitment 2026 for ECCE Education  in the उत्तर प्रदेश बेसिक शिक्षा विभाग. Candidates who are interested in this outsourcing vacancy and are registered on the UP Rojgar Sangam Portal can apply online from 16 July 2026 to 24 July 2026. Read the official notification for eligibility, vacancy details, age limit, monthly remuneration, selection process, and other important information before applying.

UP Lakhimpur Kheri ECCE Educator Outsourcing  Notification 2026 : Age Limit As on 01/07/2024 Minimum Age : 18 Years. Maximum Age : 40 Years. Age Relaxation as per UP उत्तर प्रदेश बेसिक शिक्षा विभाग UP Basic Education Lakhimpur Kheri ECCE Educator Recruitment 2026 Rules.
UP Lakhimpur kheri ECCE Educator Outsourcing Recruitment 2026 : Vacancy Details Total 71 Post
UP Lakhimpur kheri ECECE Educator Eligibility Details

Bachelor’s Degree with Home Science as the main subject and minimum 50% marks (Reserved category candidates get 5% relaxation) OR 2-Year NTT / CT (Nursery) / DPSE Diploma or equivalent qualification recognized by NCTE. More Eligibility Details Read the Notification
